title: Chinatown Chacha
original_title: ไชน่าทาวน์ ชะช่า
overview: Kie, facing tragedies, prays at a shrine, discovering her family faces karma from her gangster ancestor. She meets gang members, including her great grandfather, Kung, to prevent misfortune.
